signal.ai_layer_note: Core revenue is Search/YouTube advertising (~60% of FY2025 revenue); AI (Gemini, Search AI, Google Cloud AI workloads) is an optionality layer and moat, not the primary revenue driver
signal.sbc_note: get_ratios sharesOutstanding = 5,456M is GOOG class only; diluted shares 12,230M from FY2025 financials used for EPS consistency. SBC $24,953M / 12,230M diluted shares = $2.04/share
signal.peg_note: Clean fwd P/E 31.69 ÷ 5.5% derived CAGR (eps_growth_5y unavailable; fallback (14.45/11.06)^(1/5) − 1 = 5.5%; 1-year NTM/TTM growth ~31% — conservative 5y bridge applied per methodology)
signal.qualitative_note: PEG 5.76 driven by conservative 5y CAGR fallback (5.5%; eps_growth_5y unavailable) — CAUTION is purely valuation-based; no qualitative red flags. AI optionality premium 6.7% ($91.4B capex × 70% AI fraction × 5× proxy ÷ $4,765B market cap) — investment appears proportionate.
signal.tam_optionality_note: AI optionality premium: 6.7% — $91.4B TTM capex × 70% AI fraction × 5× proxy / $4,765B market cap. AI investment appears proportionate to core business value. (Assumption: 70% of capex attributed to AI data centre build-out per Alphabet public guidance; 5× proxy multiple.)

meta.notes: eps_growth_5y unavailable from yfinance; 5y CAGR derived via fallback formula. sharesOutstanding in get_ratios (5.456B) is GOOG class only; diluted shares (12.23B) from financials used throughout for EPS consistency. alias GOOGL resolves to same underlying business — canonical ticker GOOG used per COVERAGE.md.
